scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:db
scripts.test:regression:full: npm run test:regression && npm run build
scripts.test:public-pool: node --import tsx --test src/lib/public-pool/display.test.ts && CRM_ALLOW_TEST_DB_BIND=1 node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 src/lib/public-pool/claim-limits.test.ts
scripts.test:recycle-bin: node --import tsx --test src/lib/recycle-bin/recycle-bin.test.ts && CRM_ALLOW_TEST_DB_BIND=1 node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 src/lib/recycle-bin/archive-customer.test.ts src/lib/recycle-bin/restore-customer.test.ts src/lib/recycle-bin/purge-preview.test.ts src/lib/recycle-bin/purge-preview-api.test.ts src/lib/recycle-bin/purge-relations.test.ts
scripts.test:auth: node --import tsx --test src/lib/auth/lockout.test.ts src/lib/auth/ip-email-restriction.test.ts src/lib/auth/login-ip-restriction-client.test.ts src/lib/auth/timeout-login-visits.test.ts src/lib/auth/idle-relogin-cookie.test.ts src/lib/auth/device.test.ts src/lib/devices/ua-summary.test.ts src/lib/permissions/middleware-guard.test.ts "src/app/(auth)/login/login-form-response.test.ts"
scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test src/lib/help/sections.test.ts src/lib/public-pool/display.test.ts src/lib/users/display.test.ts src/lib/permissions/middleware-guard.test.ts
